conjointmatchups 0.0.0.9000

Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

conjointmatchups 0.0.0.9000

  • Initial scaffold.
  • as_tasks() / as_profiles(): lossless pivot between profile-long and task-wide representations of a forced-choice conjoint.
  • get_matchups(): extract the subset of tasks realizing a specified contrast between two profiles, with a clean binary outcome.
  • valid_contrast() / contrast_message(): guard against ill-defined (non-mutually-exclusive) contrasts.
  • check_conjoint(): validate the forced-choice data contract.
  • afcp(): thin Average Feature Choice Probability estimator over a matchup.

Developed by Alexander Coppock.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
